title: Better Rockets
description: Stores firework rockets to never run out of them in your elytra flight!
body:
**Tired of running out of firework rockets mid-flight? Frustrated with constantly swapping stacks in your inventory?** The **Better Rockets** mod introduces the _Rocket Bundle_ — the perfect item for all elytra enthusiasts!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZtQkHa6rObQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features:

* **Rechargeable Rocket Storage:** The Rocket Bundle holds up to eight stacks of firework rockets, freeing up valuable inventory space for other essentials.

* **Intuitive Charging System:** Refill your Rocket Bundle easily by dragging firework rockets over it in your inventory and left-clicking, just like you would with the bundle item. By right-clicking the Rocket Bundle, you can discharge it and retrieve your original firework rockets.

* **Handy Fuel Gauge:** Keep track of your rocket supply with the Rocket Bundle's item bar, which visually displays the amount of fuel left, ensuring you're never caught unprepared in the skies.

* **Faithful to Vanilla Minecraft:** The mod aims to not distort the integrity of your original Minecraft. This means, the Rocket Bundle is designed to blend into Vanilla Minecraft neatly, is not over-powered, and does not alter the standard firework rocket behavior when flying with the Elytra!

# Why Choose Better Rockets?

Whether you're exploring vast biomes, escaping danger, or just enjoying the thrill of flight, the Rocket Bundle makes elytra flying more efficient and fun. No more fumbling with stacks of rockets or running out of boost at a critical moment—Better Rockets is a must-have mod for any adventurer who loves to soar!

Download now and experience the freedom of the skies like never before!

# Installation:

Currently, this mod is only available for the Fabric mod loader. Simply insert it to the /mods folder in your client or server. Make sure to also have [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) installed.
